action: Wrote research doc for keyboard & focus accessibility improvements
rationale: Mobile touch support pipeline is complete (research → design → build done). Identified keyboard/focus accessibility as the next priority from the styleguide's documented gaps: 'No focus/keyboard-nav styles beyond browser defaults'. Game cards are also not keyboard-accessible (div onclick with no tabindex/role).
nextStep: Design phase — write design doc with exact CSS selectors, focus-visible styles, and HTML attribute changes
